title: AI Agents: How Do We Take Back Control? | Trailer
summary: A documentary hosted by Alex Kantrowitz examines the gap between AI agent deployment and organizational control, featuring interviews with technologists, executives, and government officials. Research of 750 leaders found that 80% of organizations deploy AI agents but only 10% feel in control, with only one-third of production agents running with zero human oversight.
writeup: This trailer previews a documentary hosted by Alex Kantrowitz on the gap between AI agent deployment and organizational control, drawing on interviews with technologists, executives, and government officials. The framing matters because adoption is outpacing oversight: research of 750 leaders found that 80% of organizations deploy AI agents while only 10% feel in control. The summary also reports that only one-third of production agents run with zero human oversight, sharpening the question of who governs these systems once they reach production.
